_meta.description: Execution-topology projection of the Postgres route-trace ledger (FRE-548 / ADR-0088). One doc per (trace_id, task_id): the turn-level row (role=primary, task_id absent) plus one segment per sub-agent (role=sub_agent), emitted on-write at the observe_topology seam to index agent-topology-YYYY-MM-DD. dynamic:false with an explicit schema — join keys keyword, authoritative_cost_usd double, latency_total_ms float — so accidental extra fields are stored-not-indexed rather than auto-mistyped. Unblocks the FRE-537 execution-topology Kibana panels.
